changes.diff:
@@ -16,3 +16,3 @@
 from sphinx.deprecation import RemovedInSphinx40Warning, deprecated_alias
-from sphinx.pycode import ModuleAnalyzer
+from sphinx.pycode import ModuleAnalyzer, PycodeError
 from sphinx.util import logging
@@ -310,8 +310,18 @@
     if analyzer:
-        # append instance attributes (cf. self.attr1) if analyzer knows
-        namespace = '.'.join(objpath)
-        for (ns, name), docstring in analyzer.attr_docs.items():
-            if namespace == ns and name not in members:
-                members[name] = ClassAttribute(subject, name, INSTANCEATTR,
-                                               '\n'.join(docstring))
+        # append instance attributes (cf. self.attr1) if analyzers know
+        for cls in getmro(subject):
+            try:
+                if cls.__module__ == subject.__module__:
+                    cls_analyzer = analyzer
+                else:
+                    cls_analyzer = ModuleAnalyzer.for_module(cls.__module__)
+                    cls_analyzer.analyze()
+
+                namespace = cls.__qualname__
+                for (ns, name), docstring in cls_analyzer.attr_docs.items():
+                    if namespace == ns and name not in members:
+                        members[name] = ClassAttribute(cls, name, INSTANCEATTR,
+                                                       '\n'.join(docstring))
+            except (AttributeError, PycodeError):
+                pass
